utterances.speaker: Katie
utterances.text: You were so funny with that waiter ! You are such a nut !

emotion_cause.span: 1_You were so funny with that waiter ! You are such a nut !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , breadstick fangs are always funny .

emotion_cause.span: 1_You were so funny with that waiter ! You are such a nut !

utterances.speaker: Katie
utterances.text: No , you make them funny . You are the funny one !

emotion_cause.span: 3_you make them funny . You are the funny one !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Uhh , look Katie , uh listen , we ... we need to talk .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I ... I really do , I like you a lot .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But sometimes when you , when you playfully punch me like that it ... it feels like someone hitting me with a very tiny but very real bat .

emotion_cause.span: 9_when you playfully punch me like that it ... it feels like someone hitting me with a very tiny but very real bat .

utterances.speaker: Katie
utterances.text: Aww , like I could hurt you . Are you making fun of my size ? Do not make fun of me because of my size !
